You are currently browsing the Luscious Locks weblog archives for October, 2008.
Traditionally, shampoo comes liquid form, bottle. Some are thicker than others, but it's all definitely liquid. Well being the innovators that they are, cosmetics company Lush have developed the solid shampoo. looks and feels exactly like bar soap, but you use your hair! Simply lather your hands you would soap, and then rub into your hair, and simply rinse off!
There are more than ten different varieties, from The Blonde (pictured) which, the name suggests, will restore faded blondes their former glory, there's even one called Hard, which specially developed for people who live hard water areas help reduce the effects hard water hair.
you look after your shampoo bar properly keeping dry (Lush also make handy shampoo bar tin), then should last for about washes. They range price from £3.50 £5.25, which pretty good value considering how long they last, and with all Lush products only natural ingredients are used and they're not tested animals.
Have look your local Lush store online and embrace the solid revolution!

So, Hurricane Irene has decided she doesn't want back school! The first day school county Maryland will cancelled due the storm damage. have never life heard the first day school being cancelled! disappointed that won't see the students tomorrow but glad able finish some tasks before the first day.
will, however, use Hurricane Irene teaching opportunity. Perhaps will read about hurricanes this week and map each state that was affected it. can create analogy about how the conditions need just right for hurricane occur and compare how success the classroom depends that same type scenario. hope this all that Mother Nature has store for this school year sure she has few snowstorms her sleeve well! anyone else off school tomorrow due Irene? Tell about commenting below!
Sorry you are losing the first day. Here's great first Tuesday!

From the DJFL HOME Page, click Edit Account the bottom the left hand menu. Follow the instructions the next page and then click your name edit your information. Make sure the check box "no emails" NOT checked and make sure all the email addresses you want receive notices are there. Put semicolon and space between email addresses. sure click the Submit button when you are done.
Ideally, you want add BOTH parents when setting the player account. add guardian later, scroll the bottom player record (see above for the Edit Account instructions) and click the box "clone adult" and then enter the name the guardian, cell phone and email address (and any other information that different from the player. You can delete the DOB and Grade).

4-Be sure that the "NO EMAILS" box NOT checked off.

Each year, hold fantastic Summer School programme available for all our Year students that are due start with September the new academic year. The Summer programme lasts for the first week the summer holidays. Students will able participate workshops which are cross curricular and fun. whatever your interests there will something for you!!

like the word "stuff" offers easy out when can't come with title for post. also sports nonchalantness that speaks confidence and aloofness while the same time connects with the ordinariness life, especially when referencing July 28th, well known ordinary day.
They call those "helmet urchins" and sometimes "shingle urchins" and they're found the boundary formed immovable rocks clashing with dynamic oceans. These guys know something about holding for dear life powerful waves assault the shores this island.
actually least this side the island waves have been mighty scarce. We're now our sixth seventh week without significant waves. waves, surfers it's been long spell powerful long time since last snapped photo surfer. Every day, the water sports slight chop but for the most part surprisingly calm.
Anyway, this ordinary day, walked the shoreline near Casa Emdeko, the place where usually stayed when visiting the Big Island. was hoping for some tidal pools dispersed along the rocky shores, but came away somewhat disappointed. mean, saw some interesting things. Things like, for instance, old friend Elephant Log
and yet another bleached coral looking like face (tilt your head sideways; you don't see it, try the other way)
fact, everywhere looked there were faces
the way, that's blatant false advertising that object was easily identifiable; it's parasail could see the people hanging from
Yes, all these shots are from the Nikon P900. was very hot day and didn't feel like lugging around pounds photo equipment black shoulder pack. was, after forty minutes, was literally drenched from dripping sweat.
Here are some shots the helmet urchins shores caressed gentle swells.
might have left you with the impression that didn't see much way tidepools, and that correct but did see some. I'll show most the photos, but all the photos are both the gallery below and the SmugMug Gallery HERE.
couple things with those photos those little black fish they range from half-inch long 4-5 inches are very quick hiding whenever you near the pools. You then have stand there, not moving, for little while before they venture out again.
The other things note are all the shells. You can see couple instances, but those are all hermit crabs.
Something else amazes about these fish they jump from pool pool. I'm talking couple feet and occasionally more. So, for instance, was common for walk little pool and have the fish take running swimming leaps into the next pool over. Sometimes, they jump two three pools quick succession.
So, here's the thing how they know? How they know about the other pool, where is, and how far jump? The explanation have that they "learn" the lay the land speak when its underwater and then remember when the tide recedes and all that's left are the pools.
Still, seems like leap faith because they have way knowing there's water the next pool over there how much. Leap faith get it? They jump nevermind, it's not important.
Anyway, I'm impressed. They always seem know which way jump and land the middle the next pool. I've never seen one jump and land dry lava.
You might have noticed the water limpid
Overall, the ocean pretty clear except, you know, for all the fish excrement, microorganism, and FSM knows what else swims around there that cannot see. also helped that was shooting with circular polarizer, thus eliminating most the reflection from the top the water.
usual, lots crabs around
Most are small, but few like that last one were good size. They also blend pretty well.
and they are quick, hence why some the shots are blurred. Yeah, that's right. It's not the photographer's fault; it's the subjects that screw things up.
But, back the pools
sure looks like there's not much happening, don't it?
Don't you envy them? pretty simple life, completely unaware two idiots threatening nuclear destruction each other.
Oops! really don't want there. Maybe I'll post about the human condition and the assholes who actively diminish its quality. But not today.
Today, watch these little suckers literally.
Here's another short clip
For them interested, the above save the limpid water shot are all from this one pool
microcosm all onto itself, roughly four feet one foot wide.
This next shot the Kona Body Glove, one Kona's tour boats, coming back from excursion. The photo grainy because was maximum zoom; the boat was about 150 yards from position shore.
I'm only showing intro the video
find interesting that the videos appear better than the still photos. Then again, the videos are seldom shot maximum magnification.
Let show you few more things you see when walking with your eyes looking down.
Something that looks like potato stuck the lava
sea slug shallow pool
very interesting collage broken coral along with larger piece that must have been worn smooth the wave action
Here's closeup the broken coral pieces along with mixture shell remains
But, that piece coral really held interest. very much wanted grab and add 10-20 pounds worth samples from beaches around the island. Except, don't know what would with still, now regret not grabbing it.
you click the photo, you can see its interesting texture. think would have made for excellent macro subject.
These next three shots were snapped because plan using them for some the Deep Dream combinations. Plus, you know, they look interesting.
Same area with progressively longer zoom. the sequence seems get darker, that's because the sun decided hide behind cloud was shooting.
I'll end with series shots gate. That's right; one them rolling gates that keep people from coming into your driveway.
There are three gates I've been meaning photograph, and this one them. You got admit it's pretty cool.
The waterfront house sits small private lot. 1,400 square feet, it's larger than most, and looks well maintained. can yours for mere $1,999,900. bargain, really; mean, looks much better than many the homes along Aliʻi drive, including some the shacks directly opposite plus, you get the neat gate with it. But, you know, must cost lot insure for even small tsunami will some damage.
Here are few close-ups some the features. There are few more photos the gallery below.
And that was day stuff. Well, really, only few hours it. The rest the day were back the condo, sitting front multiple fans and trying not move too much.
Here the gallery all the photos from July 28, 2017.

I've seen wood carvings the entrances drives when was Colorado (eagles, bears, pumas) but have not seen gates ornate this one depicting mountain wildlife.

was pleased with the quality the P900 shots. Still off from the D7000 with lens that itself costs more than the P900, but overall very usable shots. I'm thinking not carrying the full complement gear for the trip. We'll see.
